case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. TPBZNTE LOPEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, TPBZNTE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-31-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $269.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, TPBZNTE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, TPBZNTE $6,755.40 PRINCIPAL, $92.48 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,117.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, TPBZNTE
